title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Kia India

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Kia India
jsonLd.description:
Kia India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Plant Manager to join our dynamic team in Ahmedabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Kia India:
Kia India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Project Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kia India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
